svg.text: High-level customer-value sequence for going live against Simplify without chasing feature parity.
Launch thesis: smarter search, not faster spam
Simplify helps apply faster. Reqon helps users run the search.
Everything left of the snap line must be credible before go-to-market.
Scout/source setup, company career pages, prioritized queue
Fit reasoning, Apply Next, role summary, compensation/remote parsing
Today view, follow-ups, extension clipping, reminders
P0 launch gates — highest customer value before market

text.tspan: Show what to do next, not just

svg.text: Use this as an executive visual: the MD remains the detailed agent/build file; this is the market-facing planning view.
